base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_galactic_heroes_scoreboard — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. 'THE GALACTIC HEROES / BEST 5' scoreboard — top-5 hi-scores with SCORE and NAME columns (3-letter initials). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'THE GALACTIC HEROES / BEST 5' scoreboard — top-5 hi-scores with SCORE and NAME columns (3-letter initials); rendered in cyan text on black
